// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
using System.Linq;

namespace MainApp
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from MainApp.
    /// </summary>
    public static class MainAppServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all services tagged with 'Mediator'.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddMainApp_Mediator(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddSingleton<global::MainApp.TestQueryHandler, global::MainApp.TestQueryHandler>();
            services.AddSingleton<global::SharedModule.IRequestHandler<global::MainApp.TestQuery, string>>((global::System.IServiceProvider sp) => sp.GetRequiredService<global::MainApp.TestQueryHandler>());

            return services;
        }
    }
}
